summary: flywheel-toolset-parity now clears the focused parity matrix test and the canonical CLI scorecard at 1000/1000.
changes: Replaced the stale literal canonical checker path in tests/flywheel-toolset-parity.sh with the real skill path.
Added focused assertions for canonical dry-run JSON and full canonical scorecard pass.
Updated the local flywheel-toolset-parity binary so root help documents the repair --dry-run safe mutation surface.
Updated repair --dry-run --json to emit dry_run=true and actual_actions=[].
Added help exit-codes / --exit-codes coverage with documented success, usage, transient retry, gate, and domain failure classes.
public_boundary: The binary is a local full-substrate operator tool under ~/.local/bin, not a reduced public installer requirement.
